Start a Demo

Your Twin, custom built for you.

Design your Twin

Complete an interview to shape how your Twin thinks, speaks, and responds. Define your voice & expertise so every interaction feels natural and distinctly yours. Then leave it to us to train and fine-tune your Twin until it's perfect.

Launch your Twin

We'll help you deploy your Twin across the moments that matter. Once live, it works continuously—answering questions, guiding conversations, and supporting your audience without ongoing effort.

Influence everywhere

Be present everywhere at once. Your Twin delivers your insights consistently across platforms, audiences, and time zones—extending your reach without stretching you thin.

Ask away

Why shouldn't I just build a custom GPT?

A custom GPT is a personal tool; a Steno AI Twin is a custom business asset and a digital embodiment of you. It's your voice, your brain, and your training fine-tuned into a personal AI model, not just a chatbot with files. It lives wherever you want—your website, mobile app, or any screen via our SDK—allowing you to scale yourself into your own ecosystem and turn engagement into a secure revenue channel.

Will an AI Twin cannibalize sales of my existing products or services?

No, our customers say it acts as a force multiplier. It offers a completely different modality of interaction that enhances your business without replacing your original offerings. Instead of cannibalizing, it drives growth by building relationships and leading users directly to your products and services when they are most engaged.

Can I adjust the personality or behavior of my AI Twin?

Yes, you have full control inside the dashboard. This is the area where Steno invests the most to give you market-leading creative control. You can shape your Twin's behavior to match your brand perfectly—whether you need a "Tough Love" style or a "Gentle Support" guide—giving you the freedom to fine-tune exactly how it interacts.

 I’m incredibly busy. How much time will this take me?

You can go live the same day. Once you sign up, you can start creating your AI Twin immediately with the help of an intelligent agent built directly into your dashboard. If you need extra help, our human AI Success Specialists are available to support you.

How do you ensure the AI Twin doesn't say something off-brand?

Protecting brand integrity is our priority. We have clear guardrails in place, and by default, the Steno Twin Engine forces the AI Twin to stick strictly to the content you provided. This ensures your Twin relies on your intelligence rather than making things up.

Does the voice actually sound like me, or like a robot?

It sounds authentically like you. You simply upload a few minutes of audio directly to the dashboard, and the Steno Twin Engine clones your voice instantly to create a high-quality, realistic model.

Is my intellectual property safe?

100%. Each customer's data and trained models are kept strictly separate. We never use any customer's data in any way, outside of the products & services we provide to you. We never share your data with anyone, apart from 3rd parties you have approved in writing. You retain full ownership. For more details, visit our Security & Trust Center or visit our full Resource Center.

Unlock the limitless version of you
